The Mysterious Eugenics of Aesthetic Taste
via https://sweetfish.site/checkout/0226
🔗2026-03-08

Por encima de la eugénica científica prevalecerá la eugénica misteriosa del gusto estético. [Above scientific eugenics, the mysterious eugenics of aesthetic taste will prevail.]

—Jose Vasconcelos, La raza cósmica (1925)

Will 2026 be the year of the Linux desktop?! I HOPE SO

You Don't Need to Log off, You Need to Become Sensual
🔗2026-02-16

What people want to replace you with is what they think you already are. If companies, bosses, and boyfriends want to replace you with a robot or an AI model, that’s because they already see you and what you do as simply the workings of a machine with far too many bugs.
